scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,agent,web -c cyan,yellow,green "pnpm --filter @infra-dashboard/server dev" "pnpm --filter @infra-dashboard/agent dev" "pnpm --filter @infra-dashboard/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @infra-dashboard/shared build && pnpm --filter @infra-dashboard/server build && pnpm --filter @infra-dashboard/agent build && pnpm --filter @infra-dashboard/web build
